name: Studio: Trade risk scan → Confluence → Jira
description: Load hs_trades surveillance data, Starlark flags large notionals, search Confluence for related pages, create Jira tasks. MCP uses studio_bridge (demo).

config.content: hs_trades from demo SQLite fixture. Start MCP bridge for Confluence/Jira: python3 -m mcp_bridge.server

config.code_summary: Reviews each trade row and builds a surveillance summary: keeps trades whose notional exceeds $750k or carry a PRE_CLIENT_ACTIVITY risk flag, and tags each row HIGH or LOW so compliance can prioritize follow-up.
config.code:
threshold = 750000
output = [
    {
        "trade_id": r.get("trade_id", ""),
        "book": r.get("book", ""),
        "trader_name": r.get("trader_name", ""),
        "currency_pair": r.get("currency_pair", ""),
        "notional_usd": r.get("notional_usd", 0),
        "risk_flag": r.get("risk_flag", ""),
        "priority": "HIGH" if r.get("risk_flag", "") == "PRE_CLIENT_ACTIVITY" else "MEDIUM",
    }
    for r in input_data["rows"]
    if r.get("notional_usd", 0) >= threshold or r.get("risk_flag", "") == "PRE_CLIENT_ACTIVITY"
]
